examples.title: 1 · Hello World
examples.description: The smallest flow: Inject to Debug. Press the inject button and watch the Debug panel.

examples.title: 2 · Function Transform
examples.description: Write Python in a FunctionNode to reshape the message payload. Fires every 2s.

examples.title: 3 · Switch Routing
examples.description: Route a random number to different outputs with SwitchNode; tag one branch with ChangeNode.

examples.title: 4 · Flow Control
examples.description: Gate (toggle live), Delay rate-limiting, RateProbe and Counter for back-pressure.

examples.title: 5 · Webcam Viewer
examples.description: First vision flow: Camera to ImageViewer. Needs a webcam and the vision extra.

examples.title: 6 · Webcam + YOLO
examples.description: YOLO object detection with an annotated view plus a detection-summary debug branch.

examples.title: 7 · Blur People (privacy)
examples.description: Detect, filter to the 'person' class, then Gaussian-blur each detection box.

examples.title: 8 · Video + YOLO Recorder
examples.description: VideoReader to YOLO to preview and VideoWriter. Pick a video file in the reader's properties first.

examples.title: 9 · MQTT Pub/Sub
examples.description: Publish every 5s and receive it back on a wildcard subscription. Pick a broker in the MQTT nodes.

examples.title: 10 · Person Alert to MQTT
examples.description: Capstone: camera to YOLO to confidence/label filters to a rate-limited MQTT alert.
